global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a prominent logo and a call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging new players to win rewards.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.description: A grid-like arrangement of four circular shapes, possibly representing game icons or buttons.

elements.label: StormByte logo
elements.description: A bold, stylized logo with the text 'StormByte' prominently displayed at the top.

elements.label: Top decorative element
elements.description: Another grid-like arrangement of four circular shapes, similar to the center element.

elements.description: A continuation of the grid-like arrangement, possibly indicating more game features.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A clear and inviting button with the text 'Shop now' at the bottom of the ad.
